summary: Comprehensive testing of Syntra automation platform completed. Backend APIs working excellently (94.4% success rate). Frontend loads properly with good styling and authentication, but has session management issues causing frequent logouts.

minor_bugs.issue: Email validation too strict - rejects .test domains

session_management.issue: JWT access tokens expire in 15 minutes causing frequent re-authentication
session_management.impact: Poor user experience - users get logged out frequently

session_issues.issue: Session expires quickly during navigation, requiring frequent re-login

passed_tests: Invoice creation, retrieval, and PDF download
Landing page loads with proper styling
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider increasing JWT access token expiration time from 15 minutes to 1-2 hours for better user experience. The 15-minute expiration causes frequent logouts during normal usage.
